description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the jfloff/alpine-python:3.4 Docker image with a postgres:9.3 service and defines POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER and POSTGRES_PASSWORD variables for the database. Define a single stage named test and a job called test that runs in this stage. The test job should execute the following commands in order: export DB_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@postgres, apk update, apk add postgresql-dev, pip3 install -r pipreqs.txt, cd src, and py.test --cov=dungeonbot -v. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
